name: Boon of Blazing Dawn
description: You gain a +1 bonus to an ability score of your choice, up to a maximum of 30. You have immunity to radiant damage. When you hit a creature with a weapon attack, the damage can be radiant or the weapon's normal damage type. Once per turn when you hit a creature with an attack that deals radiant damage, you can emit sunlight in a 30-foot radius and dim light for an additional 30 feet until the start of your next turn.
